description.initial: Massive wooden platforms extend into open air, thick chains rattling overhead as airships are loaded and unloaded. Ropes and rope-and-wheel systems creak with cargo. Dock workers step past the platform's edge without a second glance at the thousand-foot drop below. The smell of tar and canvas fills the air.
description.return: The bustling Sky Docks. Airships arrive and depart in a constant flow of commerce and travel.
description.atmospheric: The smell of tar, rope, and the sharp electric smell of lightning fills the air. Ship bells ring as vessels signal their arrival or departure.

north.blockedMessage: The docks end here. Beyond is only open sky.

npcs.dialogue: "Careful where you step, newcomer. These docks are busy and the drop is a long one. If you are looking for someone, try the Platia to the east. Everyone passes through there eventually."

dialogueConditions.text: "Back again? You are becoming a regular around here."

items.itemMessage: You eat the travelers rations. Simple but filling fare for long journeys.

interactables.name: Merchant Airship
interactables.examineText: A medium-sized airship being loaded with crates. Its balloon is patched in several places, telling stories of storms weathered and journeys completed. The name 'Cloud Dancer' is painted on the side of the ship.

interactables.name: Loading Pulley
interactables.examineText: A complex system of ropes and pulleys used to lift cargo from lower platforms up to the ships. The engineering is impressive.
